/ 03

The Engine: DSP/SSP synergy & funnel mapping

True performance optimization means mastering both sides of the digital auction — deep platform interoperability plus premium PMP and Programmatic Guaranteed deal frameworks, guiding audiences down the purchase funnel.

A · The Buy-Side

DSPs: The Trade Desk Kokai & DV360

Full-funnel direct response & acquisition

Machine-learning bidding models, dynamic prospecting rules, and retargeting environments across cross-screen inventory: CTV, OTT, online video, YouTube, and high-impact display.

B · The Supply-Side

SSPs & Ad Server: Google Ad Manager

Inventory integrity & yield governance

Floor price rules, publisher monetization structures, and traffic audits. Programmatic Guaranteed agreements and custom PMP contracts secure high-viewability supply before it hits open exchanges.

C · Walled Garden Anchors

Meta & Pinterest

Social intent capture & lookalike scaling

High-intent lookalike acquisition loops on Meta and visual discovery trend mapping on Pinterest, capturing demand generated by top-of-funnel video placements.

Work experience

d
Account Manager, Programmatic — Fortune 500 Retail Media (Associate Director–level scope)
Dentsu · Hyderabad
Dec 2023 — Present
  • Own end-to-end programmatic strategy and delivery for a Fortune 500 Retail Media Network: a $286M–$390M annual portfolio across 70–100 concurrent campaigns on DV360, The Trade Desk, GAM360, Meta and Pinterest.
  • Scaled account ROAS 1.8x → 4.2x (+133%) and cut CPA 18% by restructuring segmentation, renegotiating PG terms and floor prices, and running structured experimentation frameworks.
  • Trained and coached 30 programmatic traders and managers across onshore and offshore hubs, raising delivery consistency to 98%+ through SOP/QA frameworks and certification tracks.
  • Sustained 75%+ viewability, above industry benchmark, via ad verification workflows, pre-bid targeting and blocklist governance.
  • Saved 10+ hours weekly and accelerated 70+ SLA-bound reports with custom Microsoft Copilot Studio agents and API automation; independently diagnosed a DV360 creative-rejection root cause later confirmed by Google.

/ 06

Featured case study

Governing a volatile $390M retail media ecosystem without budget drift.

STAR · Buy + Supply Side
Technical read-out
$0M/wk
retail media spend governed across CTV, OTT, YouTube and display
70–0
concurrent campaigns balanced across open web and closed social ecosystems
0%
pacing target held while maximizing inventory value across all transaction tiers
Executive narrative
01 · The Problem

Fragmentation at scale

Large retail media networks fragment fast when massive budgets scale across multi-screen blocks. Without a bidirectional read on the auction, accounts suffer audience duplication, mismatched SSP floor prices, and erratic spend speeds that dilute ROAS.

02 · Inventory Engineering

Both sides of the auction, linked

Linked buy-side DSP auction parameters directly with supply-side floor constraints inside GAM, securing premium brand-safe supply lines before they hit open bidding pools.

03 · Funnel Layering

Multi-screen, top to bottom

Wide-reach CTV, OTT, and OLV for upper-funnel awareness, with lower-funnel display retargeting loops picking up intent signals cleanly.

04 · Adaptive Control

70–100 campaigns, automated bids

Balanced 70–100 concurrent campaigns across open web and closed social, with automated bid adjusters in The Trade Desk Kokai reacting to supply-side viewability signals.

05 · The Result

Absolute budget governance

Spend held tightly on a 98% pacing target while inventory value was maximized across every transaction tier: PMP, PG, and open exchange.
